changelog:
v1.0.7 Changes:

• Benchmark: Fixed CPU score inconsistency — thread affinity, JIT warmup, dead-code elimination fix
• Benchmark: GPU workload retuned — proper GPU fence sync, targets ~240 FPS on 2080 Ti class
• Optimisation Score: Fixed 4 broken Fix links (Startup Programs, GPU P-State, HAGS, Driver Age)
• Device Cleanup Tool: Fixed download failure (wrong exe name)
• Update window: Now scrollable for longer changelogs
